templates.title: Templates
templates.sub: Pre-configured setups for your workbench. Pick a template and you'll get a matching scene, optional AI agents, and starter data in the right modules — all in one click.
templates.section_agent_desc: Named AI personas with their own policy, memory, and starter mission.
templates.section_workbench_desc: Starter kits without AI — scene layout + pre-filled habits, goals, and module data. You work; the template handles the setup.
templates.seed_hint: Pre-filled entries in your modules. Created as new records; existing entries with the same seed ID are skipped (idempotent).
templates.result_seeds_summary_no_failed: {created} seed{created, plural, one {} other {s}} new, {skipped} already present.
templates.result_seeds_summary_with_failed: {created} seed{created, plural, one {} other {s}} new, {skipped} already present, {failed} failed.
